description: Array of circle nodes; highlight compare pair in yellow, swap in red with position swap animation, mark sorted in green.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Bubble Sort", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        vals = [5, 3, 8, 1, 4]
        n = len(vals)
        nodes = VGroup()
        for i, v in enumerate(vals):
            sq = Square(side_length=0.8, color=WHITE)
            sq.move_to(RIGHT * (i - n / 2 + 0.5) * 1.1)
            lbl = Text(str(v), font_size=28).move_to(sq.get_center())
            nodes.add(VGroup(sq, lbl))
        self.play(FadeIn(nodes))
        self.wait(0.3)

        for i in range(n - 1):
            for j in range(n - 1 - i):
                a, b = nodes[j], nodes[j + 1]
                self.play(
                    a[0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.5),
                    b[0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.5),
                    run_time=0.2,
                )
                if vals[j] > vals[j + 1]:
                    pos_a, pos_b = a.get_center().copy(), b.get_center().copy()
                    self.play(
                        a[0].animate.set_fill(RED, opacity=0.6),
                        b[0].animate.set_fill(RED, opacity=0.6),
                        run_time=0.1,
                    )
                    self.play(
                        a.animate.move_to(pos_b),
                        b.animate.move_to(pos_a),
                        run_time=0.4,
                    )
                    nodes[j], nodes[j + 1] = nodes[j + 1], nodes[j]
                    vals[j], vals[j + 1] = vals[j + 1], vals[j]
                self.play(
                    nodes[j][0].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                    nodes[j + 1][0].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                    run_time=0.15,
                )
            self.play(nodes[n - 1 - i][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN, opacity=0.4), run_time=0.15)
        self.play(nodes[0][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN, opacity=0.4), run_time=0.15)
        done = Text("Sorted!", font_size=28, color=GREEN).next_to(nodes, DOWN, buff=0.8)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(1)

description: 4x4 input grid + 2x2 kernel; yellow highlight slides over input windows, 3x3 output cells appear one by one.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("CNN Convolution", font_size=34, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        input_vals = [[1, 2, 3, 0], [0, 1, 2, 3], [3, 0, 1, 2], [2, 3, 0, 1]]
        kernel_vals = [[1, 0], [0, 1]]
        cell = 0.6
        in_origin = LEFT * 3.5 + UP * 0.5
        k_origin = ORIGIN + UP * 0.5

        def make_grid(vals, origin, color):
            g = VGroup()
            for r, row in enumerate(vals):
                for c, v in enumerate(row):
                    sq = Square(side_length=cell, color=color, stroke_width=1.5)
                    sq.move_to(origin + RIGHT * c * cell + DOWN * r * cell)
                    lbl = Text(str(v), font_size=16).move_to(sq.get_center())
                    g.add(sq, lbl)
            return g

        in_grid = make_grid(input_vals, in_origin, BLUE)
        k_grid = make_grid(kernel_vals, k_origin, ORANGE)
        in_lbl = Text("Input 4x4", font_size=18, color=BLUE).next_to(in_grid, UP, buff=0.15)
        k_lbl = Text("Kernel 2x2", font_size=18, color=ORANGE).next_to(k_grid, UP, buff=0.15)
        self.play(FadeIn(in_grid), Write(in_lbl))
        self.play(FadeIn(k_grid), Write(k_lbl))
        self.wait(0.3)

        out_origin = RIGHT * 3.0 + UP * 0.5
        out_lbl = Text("Output 3x3", font_size=18, color=GREEN).move_to(
            out_origin + UP * (cell * 1.5 + 0.3)
        )
        self.play(Write(out_lbl))

        highlight = Square(side_length=cell * 2, color=YELLOW, stroke_width=3)
        highlight.move_to(in_origin + RIGHT * cell / 2 + DOWN * cell / 2)
        self.play(Create(highlight))

        for r in range(3):
            for c in range(3):
                val = sum(
                    input_vals[r + dr][c + dc] * kernel_vals[dr][dc]
                    for dr in range(2)
                    for dc in range(2)
                )
                target = in_origin + RIGHT * (c + 0.5) * cell + DOWN * (r + 0.5) * cell
                self.play(highlight.animate.move_to(target), run_time=0.22)
                out_sq = Square(side_length=cell, color=GREEN, stroke_width=1.5)
                out_sq.move_to(out_origin + RIGHT * c * cell + DOWN * r * cell)
                out_num = Text(str(val), font_size=16).move_to(out_sq.get_center())
                self.play(FadeIn(out_sq), Write(out_num), run_time=0.18)

        self.play(FadeOut(highlight))
        arrow = Arrow(LEFT * 1.8 + UP * 0.5, RIGHT * 2.2 + UP * 0.5, color=WHITE)
        self.play(Create(arrow))
        self.wait(1)

description: Token boxes in a row; query token highlighted; attention weight bars animate up; arrow to context vector.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Self-Attention", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        tokens = ["The", "cat", "sat"]
        boxes = VGroup()
        box_labels = VGroup()
        for i, tok in enumerate(tokens):
            box = Rectangle(width=1.3, height=0.65, color=BLUE)
            box.move_to(LEFT * 2 + RIGHT * i * 1.7 + UP * 1.5)
            lbl = Text(tok, font_size=22).move_to(box.get_center())
            boxes.add(box)
            box_labels.add(lbl)
        self.play(FadeIn(boxes), Write(box_labels))
        self.wait(0.3)

        query_idx = 1
        self.play(boxes[query_idx].animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.45))
        q_label = Text("Query: cat", font_size=20, color=YELLOW).next_to(boxes, UP, buff=0.25)
        self.play(Write(q_label))

        scores = [0.2, 0.6, 0.2]
        bars = VGroup()
        score_texts = VGroup()
        bar_base_y = UP * 0.2
        for i, (tok, sc) in enumerate(zip(tokens, scores)):
            bar = Rectangle(
                width=0.55, height=max(sc * 2.5, 0.05),
                color=ORANGE, fill_opacity=0.8, stroke_width=1,
            )
            bar_x = LEFT * 2 + RIGHT * i * 1.7
            bar.move_to(bar_x + bar_base_y + DOWN * (1.25 - sc * 1.25))
            s_lbl = Text(f"{sc:.1f}", font_size=18).next_to(bar, UP, buff=0.08)
            bars.add(bar)
            score_texts.add(s_lbl)

        attn_label = Text("Attention Weights", font_size=18, color=ORANGE).next_to(bars, DOWN, buff=0.25)
        self.play(FadeIn(bars), Write(score_texts), Write(attn_label))
        self.wait(0.4)

        ctx = Rectangle(width=1.6, height=0.75, color=GREEN, fill_opacity=0.25)
        ctx.move_to(RIGHT * 3.2 + UP * 1.5)
        ctx_lbl = Text("Context\nVector", font_size=18, color=GREEN).move_to(ctx.get_center())
        arrow = Arrow(boxes[query_idx].get_right(), ctx.get_left(), buff=0.1, color=WHITE)
        self.play(Create(arrow), FadeIn(ctx), Write(ctx_lbl))
        self.wait(1)

description: 5-node graph; BFS from node 0; visited nodes turn yellow then green; live queue display on side.
code:
from manim import *
from collections import deque

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Breadth-First Search (BFS)", font_size=32, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        positions = {
            0: LEFT * 3,
            1: LEFT * 1 + UP * 1.2,
            2: LEFT * 1 + DOWN * 1.2,
            3: RIGHT * 1 + UP * 1.2,
            4: RIGHT * 1 + DOWN * 1.2,
        }
        adj = {0: [1, 2], 1: [0, 3], 2: [0, 4], 3: [1, 4], 4: [2, 3]}
        edges_def = [(0, 1), (0, 2), (1, 3), (2, 4), (3, 4)]

        edge_lines = VGroup()
        for u, v in edges_def:
            edge_lines.add(Line(positions[u], positions[v], color=GRAY))
        self.play(Create(edge_lines))

        node_circles = {}
        node_labels = {}
        for nid, pos in positions.items():
            c = Circle(radius=0.38, color=WHITE, fill_opacity=0.1)
            c.move_to(pos)
            lbl = Text(str(nid), font_size=22).move_to(pos)
            node_circles[nid] = c
            node_labels[nid] = lbl
        self.play(
            *[FadeIn(node_circles[i]) for i in range(5)],
            *[Write(node_labels[i]) for i in range(5)],
        )
        self.wait(0.3)

        queue_title = Text("Queue: [0]", font_size=20, color=WHITE).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(UP * 1)
        self.play(Write(queue_title))

        visited = {0}
        q = deque([0])
        order = []
        self.play(node_circles[0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.7))

        step = 0
        while q:
            node = q.popleft()
            order.append(node)
            self.play(node_circles[node].animate.set_fill(GREEN, opacity=0.8), run_time=0.3)
            neighbors_added = []
            for nb in adj[node]:
                if nb not in visited:
                    visited.add(nb)
                    q.append(nb)
                    neighbors_added.append(nb)
                    self.play(node_circles[nb].animate.set_fill(YELLOW, opacity=0.5), run_time=0.2)
            step += 1
            new_q_text = "Queue: [" + ", ".join(str(x) for x in q) + "]"
            self.play(
                Transform(queue_title, Text(new_q_text, font_size=20, color=WHITE).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(UP * 1)),
                run_time=0.2,
            )

        order_str = " -> ".join(str(x) for x in order)
        result = Text(f"BFS order: {order_str}", font_size=22, color=GREEN).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(result))
        self.wait(1)

description: 3 cache slots (MRU->LRU); PUT/GET operations animate; HIT/MISS shown; eviction visible as slot shifts.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("LRU Cache (capacity=3)", font_size=32, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        capacity = 3
        slot_rects = VGroup(
            *[Rectangle(width=1.1, height=0.7, color=BLUE_D) for _ in range(capacity)]
        )
        slot_rects.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.35)
        slot_rects.move_to(UP * 0.5)
        mru_lbl = Text("MRU", font_size=16, color=BLUE_B).next_to(slot_rects[0], UP, buff=0.1)
        lru_lbl = Text("LRU", font_size=16, color=BLUE_B).next_to(slot_rects[2], UP, buff=0.1)
        self.play(FadeIn(slot_rects), Write(mru_lbl), Write(lru_lbl))

        operations = [("PUT", "A"), ("PUT", "B"), ("PUT", "C"), ("GET", "A"), ("PUT", "D"), ("GET", "B")]
        cache = []
        slot_texts = [None, None, None]

        for op, key in operations:
            op_disp = Text(f"{op}({key})", font_size=26, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN, buff=1.2)
            self.play(Write(op_disp))

            is_hit = key in cache
            if op == "GET":
                color = GREEN if is_hit else RED
                res = Text("HIT" if is_hit else "MISS", font_size=22, color=color)
                res.next_to(op_disp, RIGHT, buff=0.4)
                self.play(Write(res))
                if is_hit:
                    cache.remove(key)
                    cache.insert(0, key)
            else:
                if key in cache:
                    cache.remove(key)
                elif len(cache) >= capacity:
                    cache.pop()
                cache.insert(0, key)

            anims = []
            for i in range(capacity):
                val = cache[i] if i < len(cache) else ""
                new_t = Text(val, font_size=24, color=WHITE).move_to(slot_rects[i].get_center())
                if slot_texts[i] is None:
                    slot_texts[i] = new_t
                    if val:
                        anims.append(FadeIn(slot_texts[i]))
                else:
                    anims.append(Transform(slot_texts[i], new_t))
            if anims:
                self.play(*anims, run_time=0.3)
            self.wait(0.45)

            removals = [op_disp]
            if op == "GET":
                removals.append(res)
            self.play(*[FadeOut(x) for x in removals], run_time=0.15)

        self.wait(1)

description: 3D surface z=sin(x)*cos(y) with rotating camera, axes labels, and color gradient.
code:
from manim import *
import numpy as np

class AlgorithmScene(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        axes = ThreeDAxes(
            x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], z_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 0.5],
            x_length=6, y_length=6, z_length=3,
        )
        x_label = axes.get_x_axis_label(Text("x", font_size=24))
        y_label = axes.get_y_axis_label(Text("y", font_size=24))
        z_label = axes.get_z_axis_label(Text("z", font_size=24))

        surface = Surface(
            lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u, v, np.sin(u) * np.cos(v)),
            u_range=[-3, 3], v_range=[-3, 3],
            resolution=(30, 30),
            fill_opacity=0.7,
        )
        surface.set_fill_by_value(
            axes=axes, colorscale=[(BLUE, -1), (GREEN, 0), (YELLOW, 1)], axis=2
        )

        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65 * DEGREES, theta=-45 * DEGREES)
        self.play(Create(axes), Write(x_label), Write(y_label), Write(z_label))
        self.play(Create(surface), run_time=2)
        self.wait(0.5)

        title = Text("z = sin(x) * cos(y)", font_size=28, color=YELLOW)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.15)
        self.wait(4)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()
        self.wait(1)

description: 6-node 3D graph with spheres as nodes, lines as edges, rotating camera showing spatial structure.
code:
from manim import *
import numpy as np

class AlgorithmScene(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=70 * DEGREES, theta=-40 * DEGREES)

        positions = {
            0: np.array([-2, -1, 0]),
            1: np.array([0, 1.5, 1]),
            2: np.array([2, -1, 0.5]),
            3: np.array([-1, 0.5, -1]),
            4: np.array([1, 0.5, -1.5]),
            5: np.array([0, -1.5, 1.5]),
        }
        edges = [(0, 1), (0, 3), (1, 2), (1, 5), (2, 4), (3, 4), (4, 5)]

        edge_lines = VGroup()
        for u, v in edges:
            line = Line3D(start=positions[u], end=positions[v], color=GRAY)
            edge_lines.add(line)
        self.play(Create(edge_lines), run_time=1.5)

        node_spheres = {}
        node_labels = {}
        for nid, pos in positions.items():
            sphere = Sphere(radius=0.2, resolution=(12, 12)).move_to(pos)
            sphere.set_color(BLUE_B)
            node_spheres[nid] = sphere
            lbl = Text(str(nid), font_size=20, color=WHITE)
            self.add_fixed_orientation_mobjects(lbl)
            lbl.move_to(pos + np.array([0, 0, 0.35]))
            node_labels[nid] = lbl

        self.play(*[FadeIn(node_spheres[i]) for i in range(6)])
        self.play(*[Write(node_labels[i]) for i in range(6)])
        self.wait(0.3)

        title = Text("3D Graph Network", font_size=28, color=YELLOW)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        visit_order = [0, 1, 3, 2, 5, 4]
        for nid in visit_order:
            self.play(node_spheres[nid].animate.set_color(GREEN), run_time=0.4)
            self.wait(0.2)

        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.2)
        self.wait(4)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()
        self.wait(1)

description: 3D stacked feature map layers showing CNN forward pass with data flowing through depth; camera rotation.
code:
from manim import *
import numpy as np

class AlgorithmScene(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=65 * DEGREES, theta=-50 * DEGREES)

        title = Text("CNN Feature Map Stack", font_size=28, color=YELLOW)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        layer_configs = [
            {"label": "Input\n28x28x1", "size": 2.0, "depth": 0.15, "color": BLUE_B, "x": -4},
            {"label": "Conv1\n24x24x6", "size": 1.7, "depth": 0.6, "color": GREEN_B, "x": -1.5},
            {"label": "Pool1\n12x12x6", "size": 1.2, "depth": 0.6, "color": ORANGE, "x": 1},
            {"label": "Conv2\n8x8x16", "size": 0.8, "depth": 1.0, "color": PURPLE_B, "x": 3.5},
        ]

        layers = VGroup()
        labels = []
        for cfg in layer_configs:
            prism = Prism(
                dimensions=[cfg["size"], cfg["size"], cfg["depth"]],
            ).move_to(np.array([cfg["x"], 0, 0]))
            prism.set_color(cfg["color"])
            prism.set_fill(cfg["color"], opacity=0.5)
            layers.add(prism)

            lbl = Text(cfg["label"], font_size=16, color=WHITE)
            self.add_fixed_orientation_mobjects(lbl)
            lbl.move_to(np.array([cfg["x"], -cfg["size"] / 2 - 0.5, 0]))
            labels.append(lbl)

        for i, (layer, lbl) in enumerate(zip(layers, labels)):
            self.play(FadeIn(layer), Write(lbl), run_time=0.6)
            self.wait(0.2)

        arrows = VGroup()
        for i in range(len(layer_configs) - 1):
            x1 = layer_configs[i]["x"] + layer_configs[i]["size"] / 2 + 0.1
            x2 = layer_configs[i + 1]["x"] - layer_configs[i + 1]["size"] / 2 - 0.1
            arr = Arrow3D(start=np.array([x1, 0, 0]), end=np.array([x2, 0, 0]), color=WHITE)
            arrows.add(arr)
        self.play(Create(arrows), run_time=1)

        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.15)
        self.wait(5)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()
        self.wait(1)

description: QuickSort with partition visualization: pivot in RED, comparison in YELLOW, partition boundary shown through active-range dimming, finalized pivot GREEN. Shows cause-before-effect and recursive sub-array dimming.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("QuickSort", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        vals = [38, 27, 43, 3, 9, 82, 10]
        n = len(vals)
        cells = VGroup()
        for v in vals:
            sq = Square(side_length=0.8, color=WHITE, fill_opacity=0.1)
            lbl = Text(str(v), font_size=22, color=WHITE)
            cells.add(VGroup(sq, lbl))
        cells.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15)
        self.play(FadeIn(cells))
        self.wait(0.8)

        step_label = Text("Step: partition", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_label))

        def quicksort(lo, hi, depth=0):
            if lo >= hi:
                if 0 <= lo < n:
                    self.play(cells[lo][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.5), run_time=0.3)
                return
            # Dim elements outside active range
            dim_anims = []
            for k in range(n):
                if k < lo or k > hi:
                    dim_anims.append(cells[k].animate.set_opacity(0.3))
            if dim_anims:
                self.play(*dim_anims, run_time=0.3)

            pivot_val = vals[hi]
            # Highlight pivot (CAUSE)
            self.play(cells[hi][0].animate.set_fill(RED_B, opacity=0.6), run_time=0.4)
            new_label = Text(f"Pivot = {pivot_val}", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.3)

            i = lo - 1
            for j in range(lo, hi):
                # Highlight comparison (CAUSE)
                self.play(cells[j][0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.4), run_time=0.3)
                if vals[j] <= pivot_val:
                    i += 1
                    if i != j:
                        # Swap (EFFECT)
                        pos_i = cells[i].get_center()
                        pos_j = cells[j].get_center()
                        self.play(
                            cells[i].animate.move_to(pos_j),
                            cells[j].animate.move_to(pos_i),
                            run_time=0.5,
                        )
                        cells[i], cells[j] = cells[j], cells[i]
                        vals[i], vals[j] = vals[j], vals[i]
                # Reset highlight
                self.play(cells[j][0].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0), run_time=0.15)

            # Place pivot in correct position
            i += 1
            if i != hi:
                pos_i = cells[i].get_center()
                pos_hi = cells[hi].get_center()
                self.play(
                    cells[i].animate.move_to(pos_hi),
                    cells[hi].animate.move_to(pos_i),
                    run_time=0.5,
                )
                cells[i], cells[hi] = cells[hi], cells[i]
                vals[i], vals[hi] = vals[hi], vals[i]

            # Mark pivot as finalized (INVARIANT)
            self.play(cells[i][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.5), run_time=0.3)
            self.wait(0.3)

            # Restore opacity
            restore = [cells[k].animate.set_opacity(1.0) for k in range(n)]
            self.play(*restore, run_time=0.2)

            quicksort(lo, i - 1, depth + 1)
            quicksort(i + 1, hi, depth + 1)

        quicksort(0, n - 1)
        done = Text("Sorted!", font_size=28, color=GREEN_B).next_to(cells, DOWN, buff=0.6)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(2)

description: Dijkstra with distance labels on nodes. GREEN=finalized, YELLOW=frontier, WHITE=unvisited. Edge relaxation highlighted in BLUE before distance update. Progressive pacing.
code:
from manim import *
import heapq

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Dijkstra's Shortest Path", font_size=32, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        positions = {0: LEFT*3+UP, 1: LEFT*1+UP*2, 2: LEFT*1+DOWN, 3: RIGHT*1.5+UP, 4: RIGHT*1.5+DOWN, 5: RIGHT*3.5}
        edges_def = [(0,1,4),(0,2,2),(1,3,5),(2,1,1),(2,4,4),(3,5,2),(4,3,1),(4,5,3)]
        adj = {i: [] for i in range(6)}
        for u,v,w in edges_def:
            adj[u].append((v,w))

        # Draw graph
        edge_lines = {}
        edge_labels = {}
        for u,v,w in edges_def:
            line = Arrow(positions[u], positions[v], buff=0.4, color=GRAY, stroke_width=2, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.1)
            wt = Text(str(w), font_size=16, color=GRAY).move_to((positions[u]+positions[v])/2 + UP*0.25)
            edge_lines[(u,v)] = line
            edge_labels[(u,v)] = wt
        self.play(*[Create(l) for l in edge_lines.values()], *[FadeIn(l) for l in edge_labels.values()])

        node_circles = {}
        dist_labels = {}
        dist = {}
        for nid, pos in positions.items():
            c = Circle(radius=0.35, color=WHITE, fill_opacity=0.1).move_to(pos)
            lbl = Text(str(nid), font_size=20).move_to(pos)
            d = Text("inf", font_size=14, color=GRAY).next_to(c, DOWN, buff=0.15)
            node_circles[nid] = c
            dist_labels[nid] = d
            dist[nid] = float('inf')
        self.play(*[FadeIn(node_circles[i]) for i in range(6)],
                  *[Write(Text(str(i), font_size=20).move_to(positions[i])) for i in range(6)],
                  *[FadeIn(dist_labels[i]) for i in range(6)])
        self.wait(0.5)

        # Initialize source
        dist[0] = 0
        new_d = Text("0", font_size=14, color=YELLOW_B).next_to(node_circles[0], DOWN, buff=0.15)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(dist_labels[0], new_d), run_time=0.3)
        dist_labels[0] = new_d

        pq = [(0, 0)]
        visited = set()
        step = 0
        while pq:
            d_u, u = heapq.heappop(pq)
            if u in visited:
                continue
            step += 1
            rt = max(0.8 - step*0.1, 0.3)

            # Finalize node (INVARIANT: GREEN = shortest path confirmed)
            visited.add(u)
            self.play(node_circles[u].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.6), run_time=rt)

            for v, w in adj[u]:
                if v in visited:
                    continue
                new_dist = dist[u] + w
                if new_dist < dist[v]:
                    # Highlight edge relaxation (CAUSE)
                    self.play(edge_lines[(u,v)].animate.set_color(BLUE_B), run_time=rt*0.6)
                    dist[v] = new_dist
                    # Update distance label (EFFECT)
                    new_lbl = Text(str(new_dist), font_size=14, color=YELLOW_B).next_to(node_circles[v], DOWN, buff=0.15)
                    self.play(ReplacementTransform(dist_labels[v], new_lbl), run_time=rt*0.5)
                    dist_labels[v] = new_lbl
                    heapq.heappush(pq, (new_dist, v))
                    # Mark as frontier
                    self.play(node_circles[v].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.3), run_time=rt*0.4)
                    # Reset edge
                    self.play(edge_lines[(u,v)].animate.set_color(GRAY), run_time=0.15)

        done = Text("All shortest paths found!", font_size=24, color=GREEN_B).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(2)

description: Merge sort showing split and merge phases. Split: array divides with spacing. Merge: comparison annotation before placing element, progressive pacing.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Merge Sort", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        vals = [38, 27, 43, 3, 9, 82, 10]
        n = len(vals)
        cell_size = 0.7
        cells = VGroup()
        for v in vals:
            sq = Square(side_length=cell_size, color=BLUE_B, fill_opacity=0.2)
            lbl = Text(str(v), font_size=20, color=WHITE)
            cells.add(VGroup(sq, lbl))
        cells.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.1)
        self.play(FadeIn(cells))
        self.wait(0.8)

        step_lbl = Text("Phase: Split", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_lbl))

        def merge_sort_vis(arr_indices, depth=0):
            if len(arr_indices) <= 1:
                return arr_indices
            mid = len(arr_indices) // 2
            left_idx = arr_indices[:mid]
            right_idx = arr_indices[mid:]

            # Visual split: shift halves apart
            offset = 0.3 * (1 + depth * 0.3)
            left_cells = VGroup(*[cells[i] for i in left_idx])
            right_cells = VGroup(*[cells[i] for i in right_idx])
            self.play(
                left_cells.animate.shift(LEFT * offset + DOWN * 0.4),
                right_cells.animate.shift(RIGHT * offset + DOWN * 0.4),
                run_time=0.5,
            )

            sorted_left = merge_sort_vis(left_idx, depth + 1)
            sorted_right = merge_sort_vis(right_idx, depth + 1)

            # Merge phase
            merged = []
            li, ri = 0, 0
            rt = max(0.6 - depth * 0.15, 0.2)
            while li < len(sorted_left) and ri < len(sorted_right):
                l_val = vals[sorted_left[li]]
                r_val = vals[sorted_right[ri]]
                l_cell = cells[sorted_left[li]]
                r_cell = cells[sorted_right[ri]]
                # Highlight comparison (CAUSE)
                self.play(
                    l_cell[0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.5),
                    r_cell[0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.5),
                    run_time=rt * 0.5,
                )
                if l_val <= r_val:
                    self.play(l_cell[0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.3), run_time=rt * 0.3)
                    merged.append(sorted_left[li])
                    li += 1
                else:
                    self.play(r_cell[0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.3), run_time=rt * 0.3)
                    merged.append(sorted_right[ri])
                    ri += 1
                # Reset
                self.play(
                    l_cell[0].animate.set_fill(BLUE_B, opacity=0.2),
                    r_cell[0].animate.set_fill(BLUE_B, opacity=0.2),
                    run_time=0.1,
                )
            merged.extend(sorted_left[li:])
            merged.extend(sorted_right[ri:])

            # Rearrange merged cells into a line
            target_group = VGroup(*[cells[i] for i in merged])
            center = target_group.get_center()
            for idx, m_idx in enumerate(merged):
                target_x = center[0] + (idx - len(merged)/2 + 0.5) * (cell_size + 0.1)
                target_y = center[1] + 0.4
                self.play(cells[m_idx].animate.move_to([target_x, target_y, 0]), run_time=0.2)
            return merged

        result = merge_sort_vis(list(range(n)))
        # Final: all green
        self.play(*[cells[i][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4) for i in result], run_time=0.5)
        done = Text("Sorted!", font_size=28, color=GREEN_B).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(2)

description: Hash table with separate chaining. Shows hash computation, slot lookup, collision handling. Color: BLUE=slot, YELLOW=computing hash, GREEN=placed, RED=collision.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Hash Table — Separate Chaining", font_size=32, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        num_slots = 5
        slots = VGroup()
        slot_labels = VGroup()
        chains = {i: [] for i in range(num_slots)}
        for i in range(num_slots):
            rect = Rectangle(width=1.2, height=0.6, color=BLUE_B, fill_opacity=0.2)
            lbl = Text(str(i), font_size=18, color=BLUE_B).next_to(rect, LEFT, buff=0.2)
            slots.add(rect)
            slot_labels.add(lbl)
        slots.arrange(DOWN, buff=0.15)
        slots.move_to(LEFT * 3)
        for i, lbl in enumerate(slot_labels):
            lbl.next_to(slots[i], LEFT, buff=0.2)
        self.play(FadeIn(slots), FadeIn(slot_labels))
        self.wait(0.5)

        keys = [12, 25, 37, 42, 55, 17, 30]
        step_lbl = Text("", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.add(step_lbl)

        chain_vgroups = {i: VGroup() for i in range(num_slots)}

        for idx, key in enumerate(keys):
            rt = max(0.8 - idx * 0.08, 0.3)
            h = key % num_slots

            # Show hash computation (CAUSE)
            new_step = Text(f"Insert {key}: hash={key}%{num_slots}={h}", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            key_box = Square(side_length=0.5, color=YELLOW_B, fill_opacity=0.4)
            key_txt = Text(str(key), font_size=16, color=WHITE)
            key_node = VGroup(key_box, key_txt).move_to(RIGHT * 2 + UP * 2)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_lbl, new_step), FadeIn(key_node), run_time=rt)
            step_lbl = new_step

            # Highlight target slot
            self.play(slots[h].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.4), run_time=rt * 0.5)

            # Check collision
            is_collision = len(chains[h]) > 0
            if is_collision:
                col_txt = Text("Collision!", font_size=16, color=RED_B).next_to(slots[h], UP, buff=0.1)
                self.play(FadeIn(col_txt), run_time=0.3)
                self.wait(0.3)
                self.play(FadeOut(col_txt), run_time=0.2)

            # Place in chain (EFFECT)
            chain_pos = slots[h].get_right() + RIGHT * (0.6 + len(chains[h]) * 0.7)
            placed_box = Square(side_length=0.5, color=GREEN_B, fill_opacity=0.3)
            placed_txt = Text(str(key), font_size=16, color=WHITE)
            placed = VGroup(placed_box, placed_txt).move_to(chain_pos)

            # Arrow from slot to chain
            if len(chains[h]) == 0:
                arrow = Arrow(slots[h].get_right(), placed.get_left(), buff=0.05, color=GRAY, stroke_width=2, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.15)
                self.play(Create(arrow), run_time=0.2)

            self.play(ReplacementTransform(key_node, placed), run_time=rt * 0.6)
            chains[h].append(key)
            chain_vgroups[h].add(placed)

            # Reset slot color
            self.play(slots[h].animate.set_fill(BLUE_B, opacity=0.2), run_time=0.15)

        done = Text("All keys inserted!", font_size=24, color=GREEN_B).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(2)

description: DP Fibonacci table filling. Shows dependency arrows from dp[i-1] and dp[i-2] to dp[i] before computing. Color: GRAY=empty, YELLOW=computing, GREEN=filled. Progressive pacing.
code:
from manim import *

class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Dynamic Programming — Fibonacci", font_size=32, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        n = 8
        cell_size = 0.75
        dp_cells = VGroup()
        dp_vals = [0] * n
        dp_texts = []
        idx_texts = VGroup()
        for i in range(n):
            sq = Square(side_length=cell_size, color=GRAY, fill_opacity=0.1)
            txt = Text("", font_size=20, color=WHITE)
            dp_cells.add(VGroup(sq, txt))
            dp_texts.append(txt)
            idx = Text(str(i), font_size=14, color=GRAY)
            idx_texts.add(idx)
        dp_cells.arrange(RIGHT, buff=0.15)
        for i, idx in enumerate(idx_texts):
            idx.next_to(dp_cells[i], DOWN, buff=0.15)
        self.play(FadeIn(dp_cells), FadeIn(idx_texts))
        self.wait(0.5)

        step_lbl = Text("Base cases", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_lbl))

        # Base cases: dp[0]=0, dp[1]=1
        dp_vals[0] = 0
        new_txt0 = Text("0", font_size=20, color=WHITE).move_to(dp_cells[0][1].get_center())
        self.play(dp_cells[0][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4),
                  ReplacementTransform(dp_texts[0], new_txt0), run_time=0.5)
        dp_texts[0] = new_txt0

        dp_vals[1] = 1
        new_txt1 = Text("1", font_size=20, color=WHITE).move_to(dp_cells[1][1].get_center())
        self.play(dp_cells[1][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4),
                  ReplacementTransform(dp_texts[1], new_txt1), run_time=0.5)
        dp_texts[1] = new_txt1
        self.wait(0.5)

        for i in range(2, n):
            rt = max(1.0 - i * 0.1, 0.3)

            # Update step label
            new_step = Text(f"dp[{i}] = dp[{i-1}] + dp[{i-2}]", font_size=18, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_lbl, new_step), run_time=0.2)
            step_lbl = new_step

            # Highlight current cell (computing)
            self.play(dp_cells[i][0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.4), run_time=rt * 0.3)

            # Show dependency arrows (CAUSE)
            arrow1 = Arrow(dp_cells[i-1].get_top(), dp_cells[i].get_top(),
                          buff=0.1, color=BLUE_B, stroke_width=2, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.15)
            arrow2 = Arrow(dp_cells[i-2].get_top(), dp_cells[i].get_top(),
                          buff=0.1, color=PURPLE_B, stroke_width=2, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.15)
            arrow1.shift(UP * 0.3)
            arrow2.shift(UP * 0.5)
            self.play(Create(arrow1), Create(arrow2), run_time=rt * 0.4)

            # Highlight dependencies
            self.play(
                dp_cells[i-1][0].animate.set_fill(BLUE_B, opacity=0.3),
                dp_cells[i-2][0].animate.set_fill(PURPLE_B, opacity=0.3),
                run_time=rt * 0.3,
            )

            # Compute value (EFFECT)
            dp_vals[i] = dp_vals[i-1] + dp_vals[i-2]
            new_txt = Text(str(dp_vals[i]), font_size=20, color=WHITE).move_to(dp_cells[i][1].get_center())
            self.play(
                dp_cells[i][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4),
                ReplacementTransform(dp_texts[i], new_txt),
                run_time=rt * 0.4,
            )
            dp_texts[i] = new_txt

            # Restore dependency colors and remove arrows
            self.play(
                dp_cells[i-1][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4),
                dp_cells[i-2][0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.4),
                FadeOut(arrow1), FadeOut(arrow2),
                run_time=0.2,
            )

        result = Text(f"fib({n-1}) = {dp_vals[n-1]}", font_size=28, color=GREEN_B).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(result))
        self.wait(2)

description: Binary search tree with 6 nodes; hierarchical layout with depth-based horizontal spread. Insert shows traversal path (yellow highlight) then places node with edge arrow. Search demo traverses to target node, highlights green on found.
code:
from manim import *


class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("BST Insert", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        step_label = Text("Building tree", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_label))

        # ── data & tree storage ──────────────────────────────
        values = [8, 3, 10, 1, 6, 14]
        node_map = {}   # val -> {"circle", "label", "group", "pos", "depth", "left", "right", "parent"}
        edges = []      # (Arrow, parent_val, child_val)

        # ── layout constants ─────────────────────────────────
        ROOT_POS = UP * 1.5
        H_SPREAD = 2.8   # horizontal spread at depth 0
        V_GAP = 1.4       # vertical gap between levels

        def get_child_pos(parent_pos, depth, direction):
            h_offset = H_SPREAD / (2 ** depth)
            offset = RIGHT * h_offset if direction == "right" else LEFT * h_offset
            return parent_pos + DOWN * V_GAP + offset

        def make_node(val, pos, color=WHITE):
            c = Circle(radius=0.35, color=color)
            c.move_to(pos)
            lbl = Text(str(val), font_size=24).move_to(pos)
            g = VGroup(c, lbl)
            return g, c, lbl

        # ── insert each value ────────────────────────────────
        for idx, val in enumerate(values):
            # update step label
            new_label = Text(f"Insert {val}", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.3)
            step_label = new_label

            if idx == 0:
                # root node
                g, c, lbl = make_node(val, ROOT_POS, YELLOW_B)
                self.play(FadeIn(g), run_time=0.6)
                self.play(c.animate.set_stroke(GREEN_B), run_time=0.3)
                node_map[val] = {
                    "circle": c, "label": lbl, "group": g, "pos": ROOT_POS,
                    "depth": 0, "left": None, "right": None, "parent": None,
                }
                self.wait(0.5)
                continue

            # traverse using explicit left/right pointers
            cur = values[0]  # start at root
            depth = 0
            while True:
                # highlight current node yellow
                self.play(
                    node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.5),
                    run_time=0.25,
                )
                if val < cur:
                    next_child = node_map[cur]["left"]
                    if next_child is not None:
                        self.play(
                            node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                            run_time=0.15,
                        )
                        cur = next_child
                        depth += 1
                    else:
                        child_pos = get_child_pos(node_map[cur]["pos"], depth, "left")
                        parent_val = cur
                        direction = "left"
                        self.play(
                            node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                            run_time=0.15,
                        )
                        break
                else:
                    next_child = node_map[cur]["right"]
                    if next_child is not None:
                        self.play(
                            node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                            run_time=0.15,
                        )
                        cur = next_child
                        depth += 1
                    else:
                        child_pos = get_child_pos(node_map[cur]["pos"], depth, "right")
                        parent_val = cur
                        direction = "right"
                        self.play(
                            node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                            run_time=0.15,
                        )
                        break

            # draw edge
            arrow = Arrow(
                start=node_map[parent_val]["pos"] + DOWN * 0.35,
                end=child_pos + UP * 0.35,
                buff=0,
                stroke_width=2,
                color=GRAY,
            )
            self.play(Create(arrow), run_time=0.3)
            edges.append((arrow, parent_val, val))

            # create new node
            g, c, lbl = make_node(val, child_pos, YELLOW_B)
            self.play(FadeIn(g), run_time=0.4)
            self.play(c.animate.set_stroke(GREEN_B), c.animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0), run_time=0.3)
            node_map[val] = {
                "circle": c, "label": lbl, "group": g, "pos": child_pos,
                "depth": depth + 1, "left": None, "right": None, "parent": parent_val,
            }
            node_map[parent_val][direction] = val
            self.wait(0.3)

        # ── search demo ──────────────────────────────────────
        search_val = 6
        new_label = Text(f"Search {search_val}", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.3)
        step_label = new_label

        cur = values[0]
        while cur != search_val:
            self.play(
                node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.5),
                run_time=0.4,
            )
            self.wait(0.3)
            self.play(
                node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
                run_time=0.2,
            )
            if search_val < cur:
                cur = node_map[cur]["left"]
            else:
                cur = node_map[cur]["right"]

        # found
        self.play(
            node_map[cur]["circle"].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.6),
            run_time=0.5,
        )
        found_text = Text("Found!", font_size=28, color=GREEN).next_to(
            node_map[cur]["group"], DOWN, buff=0.5
        )
        self.play(Write(found_text))
        self.wait(1)

description: Singly linked list with rectangle nodes and pointer arrows. Shows head pointer, NULL terminator. Insert at index 2: traverses, creates node below, rewires arrows, slides into line. Delete node: highlights red, bypasses with new arrow, fades out.
code:
from manim import *


class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Linked List Operations", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        step_label = Text("Build list", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_label))

        # ── build initial list: 3 -> 7 -> 1 -> 9 ────────────
        vals = [3, 7, 1, 9]
        nodes = []       # list of VGroup(rect, label)
        arrows = []      # list of Arrow between nodes
        null_text = None  # "NULL" at end

        NODE_W = 0.9
        NODE_H = 0.6
        GAP = 0.7
        START_X = -4.0
        Y = 0.5

        def make_node(val, x):
            r = Rectangle(width=NODE_W, height=NODE_H, color=WHITE)
            r.move_to(RIGHT * x + UP * Y)
            lbl = Text(str(val), font_size=24).move_to(r.get_center())
            return VGroup(r, lbl)

        def make_arrow_between(n1, n2):
            return Arrow(
                start=n1.get_right(),
                end=n2.get_left(),
                buff=0.08,
                stroke_width=3,
                color=GRAY,
            )

        # create nodes
        for i, v in enumerate(vals):
            x = START_X + i * (NODE_W + GAP)
            node = make_node(v, x)
            nodes.append(node)

        # show structure first
        all_nodes = VGroup(*nodes)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(n) for n in nodes], lag_ratio=0.15), run_time=0.8)
        self.wait(0.3)

        # add arrows
        for i in range(len(nodes) - 1):
            a = make_arrow_between(nodes[i], nodes[i + 1])
            arrows.append(a)
            self.play(Create(a), run_time=0.2)

        # null at end
        null_text = Text("NULL", font_size=18, color=GRAY).next_to(nodes[-1], RIGHT, buff=0.4)
        null_arrow = Arrow(
            start=nodes[-1].get_right(),
            end=null_text.get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=GRAY,
        )
        self.play(Create(null_arrow), FadeIn(null_text), run_time=0.3)
        self.wait(0.5)

        # head pointer
        head_label = Text("head", font_size=18, color=TEAL).next_to(nodes[0], UP, buff=0.3)
        head_arrow = Arrow(
            start=head_label.get_bottom(),
            end=nodes[0].get_top(),
            buff=0.05,
            stroke_width=2,
            color=TEAL,
        )
        self.play(FadeIn(head_label), Create(head_arrow), run_time=0.3)
        self.wait(0.5)

        # ── INSERT 5 at index 2 (between 7 and 1) ───────────
        new_label = Text("Insert 5 at index 2", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.3)
        step_label = new_label

        # traverse to index 1 (node before insertion point)
        for i in range(2):
            self.play(nodes[i][0].animate.set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.4), run_time=0.3)
            self.wait(0.2)
            if i < 1:
                self.play(nodes[i][0].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0), run_time=0.15)

        # node at index 1 stays highlighted — this is our insertion point
        # create new node below
        insert_x = (nodes[1].get_center()[0] + nodes[2].get_center()[0]) / 2
        new_node = make_node(5, 0)
        new_node.move_to(RIGHT * insert_x + DOWN * 1.0)
        new_node[0].set_stroke(GREEN_B)
        self.play(FadeIn(new_node), run_time=0.4)
        self.wait(0.3)

        # remove old arrow between index 1 and 2
        old_arrow = arrows[1]
        self.play(
            old_arrow.animate.set_opacity(0.2),
            run_time=0.3,
        )

        # new arrows: node[1] -> new_node -> node[2]
        a1 = Arrow(
            start=nodes[1].get_right(),
            end=new_node.get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=GREEN_B,
        )
        a2 = Arrow(
            start=new_node.get_right(),
            end=nodes[2].get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=GREEN_B,
        )
        self.play(Create(a1), run_time=0.3)
        self.play(Create(a2), run_time=0.3)
        self.play(FadeOut(old_arrow), run_time=0.2)

        # slide new node up into line
        target_y = UP * Y
        self.play(new_node.animate.move_to(RIGHT * insert_x + target_y), run_time=0.5)

        # shift nodes[2:] right to make space
        shift_amount = RIGHT * (NODE_W + GAP)
        shift_anims = []
        for i in range(2, len(nodes)):
            shift_anims.append(nodes[i].animate.shift(shift_amount))
        # shift null + its arrow
        shift_anims.append(null_text.animate.shift(shift_amount))
        shift_anims.append(null_arrow.animate.shift(shift_amount))
        # shift remaining arrows
        for i in range(2, len(arrows)):
            shift_anims.append(arrows[i].animate.shift(shift_amount))
        self.play(*shift_anims, run_time=0.5)

        # update arrow positions
        new_a1 = Arrow(
            start=nodes[1].get_right(),
            end=new_node.get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=WHITE,
        )
        new_a2 = Arrow(
            start=new_node.get_right(),
            end=nodes[2].get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=WHITE,
        )
        self.play(
            ReplacementTransform(a1, new_a1),
            ReplacementTransform(a2, new_a2),
            run_time=0.3,
        )

        # reset colors
        self.play(
            nodes[1][0].animate.set_fill(BLACK, opacity=0),
            new_node[0].animate.set_stroke(WHITE),
            run_time=0.2,
        )
        self.wait(0.5)

        # ── DELETE node with value 1 (now at index 3) ────────
        new_label2 = Text("Delete node 1", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label2), run_time=0.3)
        step_label = new_label2

        # find node with value 1 — it's nodes[2]
        target_node = nodes[2]
        old_successor_arrow = arrows[2]

        # highlight target red
        self.play(target_node[0].animate.set_fill(RED_B, opacity=0.5), run_time=0.4)
        self.wait(0.3)

        # bypass: connect new_node -> nodes[3]
        bypass = Arrow(
            start=new_node.get_right(),
            end=nodes[3].get_left(),
            buff=0.08,
            stroke_width=3,
            color=GREEN_B,
        )
        self.play(Create(bypass), run_time=0.3)

        # fade out deleted node and its arrows
        self.play(
            FadeOut(target_node),
            FadeOut(new_a2),
            FadeOut(old_successor_arrow),
            run_time=0.4,
        )
        self.wait(0.3)

        # change bypass color to white
        self.play(bypass.animate.set_color(WHITE), run_time=0.2)

        done = Text("Done!", font_size=28, color=GREEN).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(1)

description: Vertical stack with container walls (left, right, bottom lines). Push: element drops from above into slot, turns green. Pop: element turns red, slides out right. Top pointer arrow tracks current top. Shows 5 pushes then 3 pops.
code:
from manim import *


class AlgorithmScene(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Stack Push & Pop", font_size=36, color=YELLOW)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))

        step_label = Text("Stack operations", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
        self.play(FadeIn(step_label))

        # ── stack frame (container) ──────────────────────────
        SLOT_W = 1.2
        SLOT_H = 0.6
        MAX_SLOTS = 6
        STACK_X = 0.0
        STACK_BOTTOM = -2.0

        # draw stack walls (left, right, bottom lines)
        wall_left = Line(
            start=[STACK_X - SLOT_W / 2 - 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM - 0.1, 0],
            end=[STACK_X - SLOT_W / 2 - 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM + MAX_SLOTS * SLOT_H + 0.3, 0],
            color=WHITE,
            stroke_width=3,
        )
        wall_right = Line(
            start=[STACK_X + SLOT_W / 2 + 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM - 0.1, 0],
            end=[STACK_X + SLOT_W / 2 + 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM + MAX_SLOTS * SLOT_H + 0.3, 0],
            color=WHITE,
            stroke_width=3,
        )
        wall_bottom = Line(
            start=[STACK_X - SLOT_W / 2 - 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM - 0.1, 0],
            end=[STACK_X + SLOT_W / 2 + 0.1, STACK_BOTTOM - 0.1, 0],
            color=WHITE,
            stroke_width=3,
        )
        walls = VGroup(wall_left, wall_right, wall_bottom)
        self.play(Create(walls), run_time=0.5)

        # labels
        stack_label = Text("Stack", font_size=22, color=GRAY).next_to(walls, DOWN, buff=0.3)
        self.play(FadeIn(stack_label))
        self.wait(0.5)

        # ── state tracking ───────────────────────────────────
        stack_items = []   # list of VGroup(rect, label)
        stack_values = []  # parallel list tracking values

        # top pointer arrow + label (right side)
        top_label = Text("top", font_size=18, color=TEAL)
        top_arrow = Arrow(stroke_width=2, color=TEAL, buff=0.05)

        def get_slot_pos(index):
            return [STACK_X, STACK_BOTTOM + index * SLOT_H + SLOT_H / 2, 0]

        def update_top_pointer(animate=True):
            if not stack_items:
                if top_label.get_fill_opacity() > 0:
                    self.play(FadeOut(top_label), FadeOut(top_arrow), run_time=0.2)
                return
            top_item = stack_items[-1]
            new_pos = top_item.get_right() + RIGHT * 0.8
            new_top_label = Text("top", font_size=18, color=TEAL).move_to(new_pos)
            new_top_arrow = Arrow(
                start=new_top_label.get_left(),
                end=top_item.get_right(),
                buff=0.05,
                stroke_width=2,
                color=TEAL,
            )
            if animate:
                self.play(
                    ReplacementTransform(top_label, new_top_label),
                    ReplacementTransform(top_arrow, new_top_arrow),
                    run_time=0.3,
                )
            else:
                self.play(FadeIn(new_top_label), Create(new_top_arrow), run_time=0.3)
            return new_top_label, new_top_arrow

        def push(val):
            nonlocal top_label, top_arrow
            idx = len(stack_items)
            pos = get_slot_pos(idx)

            rect = Rectangle(width=SLOT_W, height=SLOT_H, color=WHITE)
            rect.move_to(pos)
            lbl = Text(str(val), font_size=24).move_to(pos)
            item = VGroup(rect, lbl)

            # animate: appear from above and drop into slot
            item.move_to([STACK_X, STACK_BOTTOM + MAX_SLOTS * SLOT_H + 0.8, 0])
            item[0].set_fill(YELLOW_B, opacity=0.5)
            self.play(FadeIn(item), run_time=0.2)
            self.play(item.animate.move_to(pos), run_time=0.4)
            self.play(item[0].animate.set_fill(GREEN_B, opacity=0.3), run_time=0.2)

            stack_items.append(item)
            stack_values.append(val)
            result = update_top_pointer(animate=len(stack_items) > 1)
            if result:
                top_label, top_arrow = result
            self.wait(0.3)

        def pop():
            nonlocal top_label, top_arrow
            if not stack_items:
                return None
            item = stack_items.pop()
            popped_val = stack_values.pop()

            # highlight red then remove
            self.play(item[0].animate.set_fill(RED_B, opacity=0.5), run_time=0.2)
            self.play(
                item.animate.shift(RIGHT * 3).set_opacity(0),
                run_time=0.4,
            )
            self.remove(item)

            if stack_items:
                result = update_top_pointer()
                if result:
                    top_label, top_arrow = result
            else:
                self.play(FadeOut(top_label), FadeOut(top_arrow), run_time=0.2)
            self.wait(0.3)
            return popped_val

        # ── PUSH sequence ────────────────────────────────────
        push_vals = [42, 17, 8, 55, 3]
        for v in push_vals:
            new_label = Text(f"Push({v})", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.2)
            step_label = new_label
            push(v)

        self.wait(0.5)

        # ── POP sequence ─────────────────────────────────────
        for _ in range(3):
            val = stack_values[-1] if stack_values else "?"
            new_label = Text(f"Pop() -> {val}", font_size=20, color=GRAY).to_corner(UL)
            self.play(ReplacementTransform(step_label, new_label), run_time=0.2)
            step_label = new_label
            pop()

        # ── final state ──────────────────────────────────────
        remaining = ", ".join(str(v) for v in stack_values)
        done = Text(f"Remaining: [{remaining}]", font_size=24, color=GREEN).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(Write(done))
        self.wait(1)
